allow: PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"1234"}'\).access_token; Write-Output "토큰: $token"; $patients = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/patients" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}\).patients; Write-Output "환자 수: $\($patients.Count\)"; $patients | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  - $\($_.name\) / 위험점수: $\($_.latest_risk_score.score\)" })

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"1234"}'\).access_token; $alerts = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/alerts?days=7" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}\).items; Write-Output "알림 수: $\($alerts.Count\)"; $alerts | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  - [$\($_.level\)] $\($_.alert_type\) \(읽음: $\($_.is_read\)\)" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path dist\) { Remove-Item dist -Recurse -Force }; npx vite build | Out-Null; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; if \(Test-Path dist/index.html\) { "dist/index.html OK: " + \(Get-Item dist/index.html\).LastWriteTime } else { "NO dist/index.html" })
